\section*{Book III Source Universality --- L4 Generated Shell}

\noindent\textbf{This is the final spine book.} With Book~III, the full seven-book spine has machine-readable L4 records.

\noindent\textit{Book~III's load-bearing core is unconditional: the Unified Coercive-Transport Inequality $C_{n+1} \leq \Theta_n C_n + E_n + B_n$ depends only on Book~I's defect ledger and Book~II's LS-2 boundary law. The ACA Coercivity Chain [C] feeds Book~VI's NS-4B Sobolev surrogate.}
